title: DDS Disability Examiners by State, FY2002–FY2018
description: Long-format (tidy) table of Disability Determination Services (DDS) disability-examiner counts by geographic scope (national, SSA region, and state) and federal fiscal year, FY2002–FY2018. Single metric: dds_examiners_count. Extracted from the SSA source workbook into a tidy long format.

columns.name: rows[].code
columns.description: Scope code: e.g. 'National', SSA region, or state code/name.

geographic_coverage: National, SSA regions, and individual states
notes: Authoritative: derived 1:1 from dds-examiners-by-state-fy2002-2018.source.xlsx into tidy long format (SSA-published examiner counts, not recomputed). Top-level keys: schema='long', metric_family='dds_examiners_by_state', source_file, extracted_at (2026-05-08), fy_range=[2002,2018], rows. National 'code' value is 'National'. Column dot-paths denote fields of each rows[] object. Per methodology.md, SAOR FTE-authorized examiner counts differ in methodology from CTHRU payroll headcounts. Source URL is SSA's canonical disability-data page; exact source-workbook deep link not recorded in the file.
